card_description: The Secret Christian Church is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the "Form-Axis" (from *Ubik*) as an orthogonal time-axis along which he regressed to AD 70."
